mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bid( auction_id, bidder_id, amount, created_at ) VALUES ( #{auctionId}, #{bidderId}, #{amount}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT amount FROM bid WHERE auction_id = #{auctionId} AND bidder_id = #{bidderId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, auction_id, bidder_id, amount, created_at FROM bid WHERE auction_id = #{auctionId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY amount DESC, created_at LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

choose.when: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bid WHERE auction_id = #{auctionId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bid WHERE bidder_id = #{bidderId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

mapper.select: SELECT id, auction_id AS auctionId, bidder_id AS bidderId, amount, created_at AS createdAt FROM bid WHERE auction_id = #{auctionId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY amount DESC, created_at ASC

SELECT b.id AS id, a.id AS auction_id, a.status, a.start_price AS startPrice, a.vickrey_price AS vickreyPrice, a.bid_count AS bidCount, a.wish_count AS wishCount, a.start_date AS startDate, a.end_date AS endDate, a.cancel_date AS cancelDate, ai.name, ii.url AS representative_image_url, b.amount AS amount, b.created_at AS createdAt
FROM auction a INNER JOIN bid b ON a.id = b.auction_id INNER JOIN auction_item ai ON a.item_id = ai.id LEFT JOIN item_image ii ON ii.item_id = ai.id AND ii.display_order = ( SELECT MIN(ii2.display_order) FROM item_image ii2 WHERE ii2.item_id = ai.id ) WHERE b.bidder_id = #{memberId} AND b.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT DISTINCT b.auction_id FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_id = a.id WHERE b.bidder_id = #{memberId} AND a.status = 'ON_GOING' AND b.status = 'INACTIVE'
SELECT b.bidder_id FROM bid b WHERE b.auction_id = #{auctionId} AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY b.amount DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT b.id, b.auction_id, b.bidder_id, b.amount FROM bid b WHERE b.auction_id = #{auctionId} AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY b.amount DESC LIMIT 2
mapper.update: UPDATE bid SET status = 'INACTIVE' WHERE bidder_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT b.bidder_id AS bidderId, MAX(b.amount) AS amount FROM bid b WHERE b.auction_id = #{auctionId} AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' AND b.bidder_id != #{winnerId} GROUP BY b.bidder_id
